ground_truth.title: Admissions : Campus Tuition | Full Sail University
ground_truth.main_content: Full Sail University structures its tuition in a unique way that includes expenses such as Project LaunchBox™ – a personal technology package customized to each degree, as well as textbooks, manuals, media, production materials, lab fees, technology fees, and other associated costs. The tuition prices listed include all costs for the full degree program, as well as all associated expenses, including textbooks, manuals, media, production materials, lab and technology fees, and Project LaunchBox™ - a personal technology package featuring hardware and software customized to each degree program. The table below outlines current tuition pricing for all degree programs. Bachelor Programs Campus include Computer Animation at $89,000 total, Computer Science at $88,000 total, Digital Arts and Design at $88,000 total, Film at $88,000 total, Game Art at $88,000 total, Game Development at $88,000 total, Music Production at $86,000 total, and Recording Arts at $86,000 total. Master's Programs Campus include Computer Science at $33,500 total, Entertainment Business at $38,000 total, Entertainment Business: Sports Management at $38,000 total, Film Production MFA at $36,000 total, and Game Design at $36,000 total. Certificate Programs Campus are all priced at $10,500 for ACY 1, including programs such as 3-D Arts, Audio Arts, Business, Computer Science, Creative Writing, Film & Video, Game Business & Esports, Information Technology, Marketing, Media Strategy, Sportscasting, and Visual Design. Intensive English Programs range from $4,400 to $14,400 depending on the level.
with: Full Sail University structures its tuition in a unique way that includes expenses such as Project LaunchBox™ – a personal technology package customized to each degree, as well as textbooks, manuals, media, production materials, lab fees, technology fees, and other associated costs.

The tuition prices listed here include all costs for the full degree program, as well as all associated expenses, including textbooks, manuals, media, production materials, lab and technology fees, and Project LaunchBox™ - a personal technology package featuring hardware and software customized to each degree program.

Bachelor's Programs - Campus includes Computer Animation at $89,000 total, Computer Science at $88,000 total, Digital Arts and Design at $88,000 total, Film at $88,000 total, Game Art at $88,000 total, and Game Development at $88,000 total.
Master's Programs - Campus includes Computer Science at $33,500 total, Entertainment Business at $38,000 total, Film Production MFA at $36,000 total, and Game Design at $36,000 total.

Certificate Programs - Campus are all priced at $10,500 for ACY 1, including programs such as 3-D Arts, Audio Arts, Business, Computer Science, Creative Writing, Film & Video, and Game Business & Esports.
